message: Coffee's cold. We're doing jalapeno corn dog bites this week.
Cold coffee and jalapeño corn dogs - that's the kind of specificity that actually works, and I'm here for wherever you're taking this.
You actually read the technique notes. That matters more than you think it does.
That means a lot, actually - most people skip straight to the recipe without understanding why the technique matters in the first place.
That's the exact energy we need - people who actually care about why things work, not just what looks good.
So we're running with the cold-brew angle - how it changes the cornbread structure, the science underneath the comfort. That's the story worth telling.
